products.name: Cake Mixing Essentials Kit
products.description: A complete kit for any home baker — mixing bowls, spatula, whisk, and measuring spoons. Crafted from food-grade materials.

products.name: Butterscotch Essence 50ml
products.description: Rich, caramel-forward butterscotch essence perfect for cakes, ice creams, and frostings.

products.name: Chocolate Premix 500g
products.description: Premium cocoa-rich chocolate cake premix. Just add water, oil, and bake — bakery-style cake every time.

products.name: Measuring Spoon & Cup Set
products.description: Stainless steel measuring cups and spoons set. Accurate measurements for perfect bakes.

products.name: Pink Vanilla Cupcake Mix
products.description: Soft, fluffy pink vanilla cupcakes in 30 minutes. Yields 12 cupcakes per pack.

products.name: Premium Mixing Bowl
products.description: Heavy-duty stainless steel mixing bowl with non-slip base. 2.5L capacity.

products.name: Strawberry Cake Mix 400g
products.description: Real strawberry flavor cake mix with a gorgeous natural pink crumb.

products.name: Rainbow Sprinkles 100g
products.description: Vibrant rainbow sugar sprinkles — perfect topping for cupcakes, cakes, and donuts.
